dashboard.review_hint: Quantities that seem unusual. Confirm if correct or modify.
dashboard.banner_prediction_hint: The consumption estimate adapts to recent data: confirm only if the current quantity is correct.
dashboard.banner_no_expiry_detail: This product has no expiry date. Would you like to add one, or confirm it doesn't expire?
dashboard.banner_finished_detail: I recorded that {name} reached zero stock. Is it really gone, or do you still have some?
dashboard.banner_review_unusual_pkg_detail: You set a package of {qty} {unit} — the size seems very large. Check if correct or edit.
dashboard.banner_review_low_qty_detail: You only have {qty} in stock — seems very little, could be a typo. Confirm if correct.
dashboard.banner_review_high_qty_detail: You have {qty} in stock — the figure seems very high. Confirm if correct or edit.
dashboard.banner_prediction_less: estimate: {expected} {unit}{time}; current quantity: {actual} {unit}. If your usage pace changed, the forecast updates automatically.
dashboard.banner_finished_zero: Inventory shows zero, but recorded movements suggest it shouldn't be empty.
dashboard.banner_finished_expected: According to records you should still have {qty} {unit}.
dashboard.banner_anomaly_phantom_title: you have more stock than expected
dashboard.banner_anomaly_phantom_detail: Inventory shows {inv_qty} {unit}, but based on records you should only have {expected_qty} {unit}. Did you add stock without recording it?
dashboard.banner_anomaly_untracked_title: stock not recorded as an entry
dashboard.banner_anomaly_untracked_detail: You have {inv_qty} {unit} in inventory, but recorded outflows exceed inflows — the initial stock was likely never added as an "in" transaction. You can correct the quantity or log the missing entries.
dashboard.banner_anomaly_ghost_title: you have less stock than expected
dashboard.banner_anomaly_ghost_detail: Based on recorded operations you should have {expected_qty} {unit} of {name}, but inventory shows only {inv_qty} {unit}. Did you take stock without recording it?

security.title: 🔒 HTTPS Certificate
security.hint: If the browser shows the error "Your connection is not private" (ERR_CERT_AUTHORITY_INVALID), you need to install the CA certificate on the device.
security.token_hint: If `SETTINGS_TOKEN` is configured in the server's `.env`, enter the token here before saving settings. Leave empty if not configured.
security.token_required_hint: 🔒 This server requires a token to save settings.
security.cert_instructions:
Instructions for Chrome (Android):
1. Download the certificate above
2. Go to Settings → Security & Privacy → More security settings → Install from device storage
3. Select the downloaded EverShelf_CA.crt file
4. Choose "CA" and confirm
5. Restart Chrome

Instructions for Chrome (PC):
1. Download the certificate above
2. Go to chrome://settings/certificates (or Settings → Privacy and security → Security → Manage certificates)
3. Tab "Authorities" → Import → select the file
4. Check "Trust this certificate for identifying websites"
5. Restart Chrome

tts.extra_fields_hint: Additional fields to include in the payload, in JSON format. Leave empty if not needed.

tts.voices_none: No voices available on this device
tts.voices_hint: Available voices depend on the OS and browser. On macOS/iOS the Paola (Italian) voice is available. Press ↺ if the list does not load.
tts.test_ok: ✅ Response {code} — check that the speaker has spoken.

scale.title: ⚖️ Smart Scale
scale.hint: Connect a Bluetooth scale via the Android gateway to automatically read weight.
scale.url_hint: URL shown by the Android app (same Wi-Fi network). E.g.:
scale.download_hint: Android app that bridges your BLE scale and EverShelf.

scale.kiosk_hint: The scale is directly managed by the internal BLE Gateway of the kiosk. To pair a new device, use the configuration wizard.
scale.ble_protocols:
🔌 Supported BLE protocols:

  • Bluetooth SIG Weight Scale (0x181D)
  • Bluetooth SIG Body Composition (0x181B) — weight, fat, BMI
  • Xiaomi Mi Body Composition Scale 2
  • Generic — automatic heuristic for 100+ models
